title: TeacherBrief
description: Authorized one-class teacher brief that preserves deterministic obligations while adding source-grounded implementation guidance.

brief_id.description: UUID identifying this teacher brief for delivery, confirmation, flagging, and audit events.

teacher_ref.description: District identifier of the teacher authorized to receive this brief.

class_ref.description: District or SIS identifier of the class to which every item in this brief applies.

subject.description: Instructional subject used to contextualize practice guidance without altering mandatory actions.

school_year.description: School year for this brief in YYYY-YYYY form, with application validation requiring consecutive years.

generated_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when this brief payload was generated.

rules_version.description: Immutable rule-registry version that produced the mandatory actions included in the brief.

status.description: Lifecycle state showing whether the brief is awaiting release, available to the teacher, confirmed, or flagged.

released_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 release timestamp ending in Z once a case manager releases the brief, otherwise null.

confirmed_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp ending in Z when the teacher confirms the brief, otherwise null.

flag_reason.description: Teacher-provided explanation when the brief is flagged, otherwise null.

responsibility.description: Plain-language statement of the teacher's implementation responsibility together with its legal citation.

students.description: Authorized student sections containing only the implementation information needed for this class.

text.description: Actionable statement explaining the teacher's duty to provide the listed accommodations and supports.

citation.description: Legal citation supporting the responsibility statement, normally IDEA 34 CFR section 300.323(d).

student_ref.description: District identifier of the student whose approved obligations are shown in this authorized class brief.

student_name.description: Authorized display name used by the teacher to identify the student in this class.

obligations.description: Mandatory actions and contextual practice guidance for this student, each retaining complete source and rule traceability.

obligation_id.description: UUID of the deterministic obligation represented by this brief item.

accommodation_id.description: Stable UUID of the source accommodation, preserved across IEP re-extractions through reconciliation.

accommodation_text.description: Exact approved accommodation language from the reviewed IEP record.

action_text.description: Mandatory action copied unchanged from the deterministic obligation and protected from LLM modification.

practice_text.description: LLM-authored subject-specific guidance explaining a practical way to implement the mandatory action.

source_page.description: One-based IEP source page supporting the accommodation shown in this brief item.

source_quote.description: Verbatim IEP excerpt supporting the accommodation shown in this brief item.

source_confidence.description: Approved extraction confidence from 0.0 to 1.0 inherited from the source accommodation.

rule_id.description: Identifier of the deterministic rule that produced the mandatory action.

citation.description: Legal or policy citation supporting the deterministic obligation.
